records.question: Which reviewers have given a rating of at least 5 stars to any movie?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.stars >= 5
records.pred_sql: select t1.rID from Reviewer as t1 inner join Rating as t2 on t1.rID = t2.rID where t2.stars >= 5 limit 5
records.thought: I need to find reviewers who have given a rating of at least 5 stars. This requires joining the Reviewer and Rating tables and filtering by the 'stars' column.

records.question: Who are the reviewers named Mike Anderson with ratings of at least 3 stars given on or before 2011-01-09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' AND reviewer.name = 'Mike Anderson' AND rating.stars >= 3
records.pred_sql: select t1.rid from reviewer as t1 inner join rating as t2 on t1.rid = t2.rid where t1.name = 'Mike Anderson' and t2.stars >= 3 and t2.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' limit 5
records.thought: I need to find reviewers named 'Mike Anderson' who have given ratings of at least 3 stars on or before '2011-01-09'. This requires joining the Reviewer and Rating tables and applying filters on name, stars, and ratingDate.

records.question: Which reviewers have rated movies directed by James Cameron released in 2009 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.year >= 2009 AND movie.director = 'James Cameron'
records.pred_sql: select t1.rID from reviewer as t1 inner join rating as t2 on t1.rID = t2.rID inner join movie as t3 on t2.mID = t3.mID where t3.director like '%james cameron%' and t3.year >= 2009 limit 5
records.thought: I need to find reviewers who rated movies. The movies must be directed by 'James Cameron' and released in '2009' or later. I will join Reviewer, Rating, and Movie tables and apply the filters.

records.question: Which reviewers named Elizabeth Thomas rated the movie Avatar directed by James Cameron on 2011-01-15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.title = 'Avatar' AND reviewer.name = 'Elizabeth Thomas' AND rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-15' AND movie.director = 'James Cameron'
records.pred_sql: select T1.rID from Reviewer as T1 inner join Rating as T2 on T1.rID = T2.rID inner join Movie as T3 on T2.mID = T3.mID where T1.name = 'Elizabeth Thomas' and T3.title = 'Avatar' and T3.director = 'James Cameron' and T2.ratingDate = '2011-01-15' limit 5
records.thought: I need to find reviewers by name, who rated a specific movie by title and director, on a particular date. This requires joining Reviewer, Rating, and Movie tables and applying filters on name, title, director, and ratingDate.

records.question: Which reviewers named Chris Jackson gave ratings of at least 2 stars on or before 2011-01-22?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.stars >= 2 AND rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-22' AND reviewer.name = 'Chris Jackson'
records.pred_sql: select t1.rID from reviewer as t1 inner join rating as t2 on t1.rID = t2.rID where t1.name = 'Chris Jackson' and t2.stars >= 2 and t2.ratingDate <= '2011-01-22' limit 5
records.thought: I need to find reviewers named 'Chris Jackson' who have ratings of at least 2 stars and a rating date on or before '2011-01-22'. This requires joining the Reviewer and Rating tables and applying filters on name, stars, and ratingDate.

WHERE rating.stars <= 4

records.question: Which reviewers named Ashley White gave at least 3 stars on or before 2011-01-02 to the movie E.T., directed by Steven Spielberg, released in 1982 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-02' AND rating.stars >= 3 AND movie.year <= 1982 AND movie.director = 'Steven Spielberg' AND movie.title = 'E.T.' AND reviewer.name = 'Ashley White'
records.pred_sql: select t1.rID from Reviewer as t1 inner join Rating as t2 on t1.rID = t2.rID inner join Movie as t3 on t2.mID = t3.mID where t1.name = 'Ashley White' and t3.title = 'E.T.' and t3.director = 'Steven Spielberg' and t3.year <= 1982 and t2.stars >= 3 and t2.ratingDate <= '2011-01-02' limit 5
records.thought: I need to join Reviewer, Rating, and Movie tables to filter by reviewer name, movie title, director, year, stars, and rating date. All conditions must be met simultaneously.
